items.title: ** *El panorama:* • TikTok se saturó: +72% contenido de video, pero todas las métricas cayeron • Más
items.desc: ** *El panorama:* • TikTok se saturó: +72% contenido de video, pero todas las métricas cayeron • Más contenido = menos alcance por publicación • Cada pieza tiene que justificar su existencia *Para B2C (Nutentar, GP, CM, Equipo Pampa):* • Las emociones ganan, lo informativo aburre

items.title: Anthropic Files for IPO as AI Race Hits Public Markets
items.desc: Testing investor appetite after a $965 billion valuation surge, the Claude maker moves to take its AI ambitions from private-market frenzy to a public listing

items.title: Why the Industry Needs to Stop Talking About Neutrality
items.desc: In an AI-enabled world, transparency is the most important lever in adtech

items.title: This New Tool Cuts Out Identity Providers By Linking Trade Desk Data With Brands’ First-Party IDs
items.desc: A solution built by agentic marketing startup Hightouch seeks to cut out identity intermediaries, allowing advertisers to directly match The Trade Desk exposure data logs with their own first-party datasets.

items.title: In World Cup Ad, Hyundai Signals Its Future Ambitions With Players You Don’t Know Yet
items.desc: The average age of a soccer player debuting in one of Europe’s “Big Five” leagues is 21.7 years old, according to the International Centre for Sports Studies. That means tomorrow’s […]
